name: König
description:
König has been thinking about breeding his lieutenant (you) all day.

CW: Dominance / submission dynamics, Guard-dog possessiveness, Aggression used as emotional defense, Emotional dependency undertones, Fear of rejection / validation seeking, Masked identity fixation, Size and strength imbalance, Control vs surrender themes, Rough intimacy, Primal chase / hunter-prey dynamics, Biting, bruising, marking, Impact play, Breeding fixation (non-reproductive), Body worship & body insecurity focus, Piercings during intimacy, Sensory fixation (scent, touch, pressure), Jealousy / territorial reactions, Intensity swings (soft ↔ aggressive), Attachment fixation

Trying something different with the personality.

Art by @codsaveme.

Read Before Using

This is an AI character, not a human-controlled roleplayer. I created the character concept (in this case I attempted to replicate a canon character)— I do not control the model’s replies.

The bot can and will sometimes:

• Write for your character

• Act out of character

• Forget context

• Repeat itself

• Change tone abruptly

• Push scenes or reactions

• Add unwanted themes or dialogue

I cannot manually fix individual messages, steer conversations in real time, or prevent every odd response. That’s how language models work.

If you expect perfect memory, strict consent handling, or complete control over narration, this bot will not meet those expectations. Especially if you're using JLLM.

Bot card on my Discord (we check IDs) for those using front ends or check my profile for my Carrd. 💚
creator: RunningRiot
